summary: Make the kb pre-commit gate self-healing by auto-regenerating and auto-staging `kb/gen/*` when stale for the staged set.
decisions: Run `kb index check --diff-source staged` first; if it fails, regenerate `kb/gen/*` from the Git index snapshot (`kb index regen --diff-source staged`) and `git add kb/gen` before running the canonical gate.
Keep the gate strict for non-mechanical obligations (lint/obligations failures still block the commit); only the generated index artifacts are auto-healed.
pitfalls: Ensure the kb gate runs after any other auto-fixing hooks so the staged snapshot used for regen matches the final commit content.
Do not rely on repo-specific pre-commit auto-stage behavior; stage `kb/gen/*` explicitly inside the kb hook.
